projects.title: AI Workshop Playground
projects.description: A workshop-ready AI coding playground where participants turn natural-language web ideas into editable code with a live preview
features: Pairs AI chat, Monaco code editor, and live preview in one workspace
Adds workshop sessions with authentication, usage limits, and classroom-friendly setup
Generates editable HTML, CSS, and JavaScript from natural-language prompts

projects.title: WoW Guild Progress Tracker
projects.description: A full-stack tracker for World of Warcraft raid progression with guild leaderboards, WarcraftLogs analytics, community predictions, and live event data
features: Tracks multiple guilds across raid tiers with progression leaderboards
Aggregates WarcraftLogs, Raider.IO, Battle.net, and Twitch data
Adds prediction competitions, guild profiles, and raid performance analytics

projects.title: Unity 3D AI Assistant
projects.description: A Unity-based 3D AI assistant with a Ready Player Me avatar, voice conversation, speech output, image generation, and webcam-powered mini games
features: Uses push-to-talk voice input with spoken responses and animated avatar gestures
Supports image generation and editing through conversation
Includes webcam-based Rock-Paper-Scissors and multilingual conversations

projects.title: Whats AI Assistant
projects.description: An AI-powered chatbot demo that integrates with WhatsApp using the Neonize (whatsmeow) framework, leveraging language models to generate responses
features: Embedded directly in WhatsApp for seamless AI support
Handles multiple file types and images to enhance response accuracy
Leverages language models for context-aware and precise answers

projects.title: Voice AI Assistant Framework
projects.description: A comprehensive voice AI assistant framework that integrates speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and LLMs with memory management to enable interactive and context-aware conversations
features: Integrates speech recognition, conversational AI, and speech synthesis
Provides a flexible voice interface framework for building custom voice AI assistants
Goal is to integrate with various platforms and services to enable voice interactions

projects.title: Voice Guided Imaging
projects.description: A web-based AI imaging platform for creating and editing images from voice commands with local and cloud processing modes
features: Supports push-to-talk commands for image generation and editing
Routes work between cloud services and local inference backends
Includes session limits, persistent galleries, and queue progress updates

projects.title: Fyr'alath Data Tracker
projects.description: A full-stack app for tracking WoW patch 10.2 legendary weapon crafting cost and acquisition data
features: Shows current price craft legendary weapon per region and individual material prices
Shows price history of total price to craft per region
Shows acquisition data, daily and cumulative and per class

projects.title: Personal Website
projects.description: Personal website with CV and information about myself and my projects
features: Information about myself
Projects
CV

projects.title: Twitch Song Request Desktop
projects.description: A Windows desktop Twitch song request application with multi-platform support for song requests
features: Song requests are read from Twitch channel points redeem rewards
Supports song requests from Spotify and Youtube
Spotify songs are played via local Spotify installation
Youtube videos are played inside application

projects.title: Twitch Spotify Song Request
projects.description: A simple javascript and python script for Twitch Spotify song requests
features: Python script for generating Twitch and Spotify access tokens
HTML page with only Javascript which can be added to OBS as a browser source
No hosting required after initial setup

projects.title: Staff Restaurant Lunch Menu App
projects.description: A lunch menu mobile application with frontend and backend for previous employer staff restaurant
features: Mobile frontend with Flutter and Dart, backend with Java Spring Boot
Backend Fetches lunch menu weekly, saves to database, frontend requests menu with Rest Api
Extra features like view menu history, vote on courses, stats about courses

projects.title: Räccis SeAMK Food Royale
projects.description: An Android lunch menu mobile application for a friend
features: Displays two restaurants daily lunch menu side by side
Fetches Sodexo lunch menu with rest api in Json
Scrapes Eventti lunch menu from website html

projects.title: Tsumppi Coffee Shop
projects.description: An Android catalogue application for SeAMK student services coffee shop
features: Coffee shop products catalogue and latest social media posts
Catalogue data is fetched from google sheets
Latest social media posts are fetched from Facebook and Instagram

projects.title: SeAMK Lukkari
projects.description: An Android timetable mobile application for SeAMK students
features: Displays a student group's daily, weekly and period timetable
Create your own timetable, view other student group's timetables, search for an empty room
See weekly lunch menus from student restaurants

projects.title: SeAMK WinhaWille
projects.description: An Android study registry mobile application for SeAMK students
features: See your GPA and student credits
See all your completed courses and grades

projects.title: SeAMK Ruoka
projects.description: An Android lunch menu mobile application for SeAMK students
features: See weekly lunch menus from student restaurants
